meta.title: Session Burndown — A0 Oversight
meta.description: Everything asked vs everything done, priority-ranked, with SDLC flow references

props.title: A0 Oversight — What's Done vs What's Left
props.subtitle: Priority-ranked. SDLC flow mapped. Ready for /levloop execution.

rows.item: Prior art sweep (6 agents, 3 CASS bands, 25+ artifacts)
Adoption matrix (30+ decisions: adopt/wrap/extract/reject)
License audit (clawhip MIT, NTM MIT+rider, OMX MIT)

Detangle protocol (dump → read → claim → mail → detangle)
Manifesto re-published with CSS fixes
Context pack viewer built + published
Adoption map published to here.now
Workstream monitoring shortcuts saved

props.label: HOT — DO NEXT

props.subtitle: These are blocking, broken, or highest ROI

Wire context pack viewer as AgentPing dashboard subpage

Write VISION.md meta-harness insight (canonical source)
Write docs/PHILOSOPHY-INDEX.md (36-doc catalog)
Add ouroboros + agent-orchestrator + openfang to /now family tree

Update orchestration.dna.yaml (spawn_wait_contract)
Set up shared workstream YAML for tmux-control-plane

props.label: CAPTURED — FUTURE
props.title: Brain Dump Items (6 items)
props.subtitle: Graph integration, skill classification, Z3/TLA+ — captured not executed

rows.item: Graph entity manifest for 41 /now pages + articles + parity (lazy cache, zoom levels, git commit sync)
Big classification run: skills → lifecycle potential → alignment/crystallization buckets
Skill graph: everything is a skill, compiled FlowMinds or reverse-engineered into FlowMinds
OOO ambiguity scoring + Z3/TLA+ → mathematical proof of alignment
Architecture IR overlays at dna/architecture/X/ with feature folders (spec, harness, tests, qa)
levmail .agent-id env var fix (clobbered by parallel sessions)

props.label: SDLC FLOWS
props.title: Which Flow for Which Task
props.subtitle: 30 flows in plugins/core-sdlc/flows/ — these 5 cover the burndown

props.title: exec-validate
props.content:
**Most items.** Two-phase: implement → gate check. For: manifesto fix, VISION.md, PHILOSOPHY-INDEX, /now page updates, DNA constraints.
`lev exec "task" --profile sdlc.flowmind.exec`

props.title: plan-execute-verify
props.content:
**Multi-step items.** Plan → implement → verify. For: clawhip vendor, Poly namespace fix, article batch publish.
`lev exec --flow plan-execute-verify`

props.title: deepen-plan
props.content:
**Spec writing.** For: spec-tmux-control-plane.md consolidation.
`lev exec --flow deepen-plan`

props.title: lev-ralph
props.content:
**Iterative refinement loop.** For: manifesto redesign, article quality passes.
`lev exec --flow lev-ralph`

props.title: eval-harness
props.content:
**Produce → judge → compare → keep/discard.** For: article batch with quality gate, voice gate enforcement.
`lev exec --flow eval-harness`
